title: Balanced health advice
subtitle: Give realistic advice with empathy and caution.
duolingoBridge: B1 Output turns B1 knowledge into usable production: speaking, writing, summarizing native-style input, reacting, arguing, and self-correcting.
overview: Knowledge point 2: give advice adapted to a situation.

sections.title: Output tools
rows: but it seems to me that...

items.fr: Je ne suis pas spécialiste, mais il me semble que tu devrais ralentir.
items.en: I am not a specialist, but it seems to me that you should slow down.
items.es: No soy especialista, pero me parece que deberías bajar el ritmo.

items.fr: Il vaudrait mieux te reposer quelques jours plutôt que de forcer.
items.en: It would be better to rest for a few days rather than push yourself.
items.es: Sería mejor descansar unos días en lugar de forzarte.

items.fr: Tu peux reprendre à ton rythme quand tu te sentiras mieux.
items.en: You can start again at your own pace when you feel better.
items.es: Puedes retomar a tu ritmo cuando te sientas mejor.

items.fr: Si ça continue, tu devrais demander un avis médical.
items.en: If it continues, you should ask for medical advice.
items.es: Si continúa, deberías pedir una opinión médica.

items.fr: L’important, c’est de prendre le problème au sérieux sans paniquer.
items.en: The important thing is to take the problem seriously without panicking.
items.es: Lo importante es tomar el problema en serio sin entrar en pánico.
